title: ceratozamia hondurensis
intro: Ceratozamia hondurensis, also known as the Honduran cycad, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Zamiaceae and is native to Central America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceratozamia hondurensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
